raw_consumer_statement: I placed an order at Best Buy to purchase a TV using my Best Buy Visa credit card on XX/XX/XXXX, order number, XXXX, in the amount of {$1000.00}. I changed my mind about the order and canceled it on XX/XX/XXXX. Upon reviewing my bill, I realized that I was still being charged for this purchase and it was reducing my available credit. I called customer service and spoke to five different people who were unable to help me so I filed a dispute on XX/XX/XXXX. I received a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX stating that they are denying my dispute. I have evidence that I canceled the order and should not owe this amount. This is negatively impacting my credit score and causing unnecessary stress. I want this charge removed from my credit card bill immediately.
